titleStmt.title: SII 9.621: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 621. (A.R. No. 373 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE WEST SIDE OF THE VOLAGA-MANDAPA IN THE KOTESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTESVARA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1469, Parābhava, Kārtika, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1546 November 7, Sunday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that the king had appointed Veṅkaṭādrirāja-Mahārāya-arasu to govern the Bārakūra-rājya and that the latter placed Achchapa-Voḍeya in charge of the same. Achchapa-Voḍeya is stated to have made a gift of varāhas 50 for the service of the god Kōṭēsvara. The gift was made for the prosperity and long life of the king and for the merit of Rāmarāja-Veṅkaṭādrirāja-Mahā-arasu.

The second part records that in Virōdhikṛit, Vaiśākha, śu. 5, corresponding to A.D. 1551 April 11, Saturday, Ekadaḷakhāna-Voḍeya ruling under the orders of Veṅkaṭādrirāja over Bārakūra-rājya made a gift of varāhas 35 for performing the rite of purification of the temple of Kōṭēśvara. The gift was made for the wellbeing of Veṅkaṭādrirāja. The purification was needed to remove the pollution caused by the death of Brāhmans and Śūdras and the killing of cows in a religious feud on the occasion of Tuḍiyahabba, on account of which the door of the temple had been closed and the worship of the god discontinued for some time.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trayilō
kyanagarāraṁbha(n)mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrījayābhyudayaśā
livāhanaśakavaruṣa 1468 saṁdu Oṁbhattaneya varttamā
nada parābhavasaṁvatsarada kārttika śu 15 lu śrīmanmahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāśivarāyamahā
rāyarū vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalu cittayisi duṣṭanigraha
śiṣṭapratipālaneyāgi sakaladharmavarṇāśramaṁgaḷanu pratipālisi
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadinda rājyavanu pratipālisuttiha kāladalu śrī
sadāśivarāyaru bārakūra rājyavanu veṁkaṭādrirājamahā
rāya Arasugaḷiṁge pālisi Ā venkaṭādrirājaru bārakūra rājyava
nu Acapavoḍeyarige pālisi Ā Accappavoḍeyaru śrīsadāśiva
rāyamahārāyariga śatrukṣaya mitrōrjita Āyurārōgya
AyiśyariyābhiUraddhiyāgabēkeṁdu rāmarājaveṁkaṭādri
rāja mahāarasugaḷiṁge pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu kuḍukūra kōṭī
śvaradēvarige kārtikamāsa dina 30 ke paṁcāmrutābhiśēka dīpārā
dhane naivēdya phalapūje Uraṁdāvanapūjegaḷanū sāṁgavāgi naḍasuva
dharmakke kōṭīśvarada grāmada hudurahaḷḷiya Uralu A(ṁ)ṇnahattārara
hadiyalu ga 10 beṁgarebhaṭara hadiyalu ga 4 . ṭhakkurara
hadiyalu ga 14 biḷiya kēśaṇa hebārana hadiyalu ga 10 dha
svara hadiyalu ga 11 . Aṁtu ga 50 Akṣaradalu Āyivatu
varahananū Accappavoḍeyarū śrīkōṭīśvaradēvarige barasi ko
ṭṭa dharmaśasana bārakūra karaṇika ti(ṁ)mmarasara baraha Accappa
voḍeyara baraha mataṁ virōdhikrutusaṁvatsarada vayiśakha śu
da 5 lu rāmarājaveṁkaṭādrirajagaḷa nirupadiṁda barakū
ra rājyavanāḷuva yekadaḷakhanavoḍeyaru sadāśivama
hārāyarige Ayiśvariya UraddhiĀgabēkeṁdu kōṭīśvara
dēvarige kōṭīśvaradēvara grāmadoḷagaṇa hudaruhaḷiya grā
madalū ga 35 varahanu kuḷava kaḍidu dhāreyaneredu baresi
koṭṭa dharmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare kōṭiśvaradēvara tuḍiya
habbadalū tuḷurājyau kuḍidalli ta(ṁ)mmoḷage tāu kaḍidāḍi
brāhmaru śūdrara heṇagaḷu dēvasthānadoḷage bidu gōhatya
vāgi dēvastānada bāgilu kaṭṭi nayivēdya naṁdādīpti Uḷidu dhanya
ru Upavāsadu Āṟutiṁgaḷu pariyaṁtara hāḷāgi yira
lāgi Ā dēvara mayibhōgau naḍeyade prāyaścitake naḍasu
vadakkāgi rāmarājaveṁkaṭādriArasugaḷige dharmavāga
bēkeṁdu yekadhāḷakhanavoḍeyaru kōṭīśvaradēva
rige dhāreyaneṟadu koṭadu huduruhaḷḷiyali ga 35 varaha
ge vivara Aṁṇahattārana hadiyalu ga 10 biḷiya nāraṇahe
bāra hadi ga 7 śaṁkaraliṁgaseṭṭiya hadi ga 5 beṁgarebhaṭṭana
hadi ga 4 dhanyara hadi ga 2 cāturmmadhyastana hadi ga 7 Aṁtu ga 35 varaha
nanu yekadhārakhānavoḍeyaru Ācaṁdrārkkāstāyiyāgi naḍevati
badu bahiri yeṁdu yekadārakhānavoḍeyarū kōṭīśvaradēvarige
sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi dhāreyaneredu bara
sikoṭṭa śilāśāsana kōṭīśvara grāmada Aṇihatārara poppa . paḍu
mane hebhāraru paḍuvamaneya hatāraru mūḍamaneya
hebārara pūppa bārakūra karaṇika kruṣṇayyagaḷa baraha
yekadhārakhānavoḍeyara voppa . dānapālaneyōrmma
dhyē dānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsvargamavāpnōti
pālanādaccudaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.621 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
